description: Brown, textured wallet with embossed branding at the bottom corner and stitch detailHas two main compartmentsThe left fold has four card slots and a flap with four card slots and an ID card slot, the right fold has one insert pocket, a zipped pocket and an ID card holderA slip pocket at the backWarranty: 6 months from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects.Warranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
